category_sources: Official Hugging Face docs describe text-embeddings-inference as documentation for serving embedding models.
source_facts.description says this is an inference solution for text embeddings models.
display_name_sources: Official Hugging Face docs and repository use the display name Text Embeddings Inference.

tags_sources: Official Hugging Face docs describe CLI/server usage for serving compatible embedding models.
